# install-from-source

Install app from a URL source

## Usage

```bash
agent-device install-from-source <url> [--header <name:value>] [--retain-paths] [--retention-ms <ms>]
```

## Session Requirement

Does not require an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--header <name:value>`: install-from-source: repeatable HTTP header for URL downloads
- `--retain-paths`: install-from-source: keep materialized artifact paths after install
- `--retention-ms <ms>`: install-from-source: retention TTL for materialized artifact paths

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | No |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
